prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年云南大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约14851名→13947名→13919名→15734名→16393名，整体呈先升后降再升的波动走势。近两年（2024–2025 ）连续后移，累计后移约659名；2025年基准位次约16393名，为近五年最高（即最难进的一年）；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为20人，2025年 缩减至18人，2026年维持18人不变。计划人数在2025年缩减后保持稳定，未进一步扩招或缩招，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学为211工程 、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第83名→2022年第82名→2023年第80名→2024年第70名→2025年第69名→2026年第71名，整体处于全国前70–85名区间 ，综合实力稳步提升；2025年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要原因为就业数据（生命科学学院就业率仅4.63%）引发关注；抖音热度总排名第62位，评价为"一 般"，短视频平台关注度不高，未出现明显报考热潮信号；历史投档异常记录中未见云南大学在上海市的断档事件；第五轮学科评估中，民族学获评A+、生态学 获评A、统计学获评A-，共3个A-及以上学科。生态学（菁英班）为该校招牌专业，与A级学科直接对应；统计学为A-学科，对应招生专业中的统计学；民族学虽为A+但未在上海招 生专业中直接体现。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信类持续高热推荐；电气工程及其自动化高热推荐；数学/统计类推荐；法学分化 观望；金融/财经/经济分化观望。该校在上海招生的计算机类、电子信息类、统计学等均属热门方向。上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35%，竞争 压力显著加大；云南大学位于云南省昆明市，距上海市较远，属于跨省就读。该校在上海市 招生计划仅18–20人，占比较小，地域偏好对上海考生报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年连续后移趋势、2026年上海市考生总数大幅增加约35%带来的竞争 加剧、招生计划持平、学校层次稳步提升以及声誉热度一般等因素，预计2026年云南大学在上海市综合类的最低录取位次将在2025年16393名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低录取 位次约16593名，波动区间16093–17093名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 生态学（菁英班）
- 人工智能
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数据科学与大数据技术
- 光电信息科学与工程
- 电子信息工程
- 历史学
- 金融学（金融学+计算机科学与技术双学士学位）
- 生物技术（国家生命科学与技术基地班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 统计学
- 经济学类（含经济学、财政学、金融学、国际经济与贸易）
- 法学
- 生物科学类（含生物科学、生物技术）
- 新能源科学与工程
- 马克思主义理论
- 汉语言文学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间16093–17093名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如16000名以内）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技 术、生态学（菁英班）等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（17000名左右）应以三档专业为主，争取统计学（A-学科）、经济学类等性价比高的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Yunnan University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 14851 → 13947 → 13919 → 15734 → 16393, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again. In the last two years (2024–2025), it has continuously moved backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 659 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 16393, the highest in the past five years (i.e., the hardest year to enter). The enrollment plan for Yunnan University in Shanghai's comprehensive category was 20 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 18 in 2025, and remains unchanged at 18 in 2026. The planned number of students stabilized after the reduction in 2025, with no further expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a Project 211 and national Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years: 83rd in 2021 → 82nd in 2022 → 80th in 2023 → 70th in 2024 → 69th in 2025 → 71st in 2026, overall in the national top 70–85 range, with steadily improving comprehensive strength. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to employment data (the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences was only 4.63%) attracting attention. Its Douyin popularity ranked 62nd overall, with a rating of "average"; short video platform attention was not high, with no obvious signal of a surge in applications. No historical abnormal admission records show a gap event for Yunnan University in Shanghai. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology was rated A+, Ecology was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-, totaling three disciplines at A- or above. Ecology (Elite Class) is the university's flagship major, directly corresponding to the A-level discipline; Statistics is an A- discipline, corresponding to the Statistics major in the enrollment majors; although Ethnology is A+, it is not directly reflected in the majors enrolling in Shanghai.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are consistently highly recommended; Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended; Mathematics/Statistics are recommended; Law is divided with a wait-and-see attitude; Finance/Economics are divided with a wait-and-see attitude. The majors Yunnan University enrolls in Shanghai, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Statistics, are all popular directions. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Shanghai college entrance examination is about 66,700, an increase of about 35% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly increasing competitive pressure. Yunnan University is located in Kunming City, Yunnan Province, far from Shanghai, making it a cross-province study. Its enrollment plan in Shanghai is only 18–20 students, accounting for a small proportion, so regional preference has a limited impact on Shanghai candidates' application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings in the last two years, the significant increase of about 35% in the total number of candidates in Shanghai in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the unchanged enrollment plan, the steadily improving school level, and the average reputation and popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Yunnan University in Shanghai's comprehensive category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 16393. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 16593, with a fluctuation range of 16093–17093.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Ecology (Elite Class)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Electronic Information Engineering
- History
- Finance (Double Bachelor's Degree in Finance and Computer Science and Technology)
- Biotechnology (National Life Science and Technology Base Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Statistics
- Economics (including Economics, Public Finance, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Law
- Biological Sciences (including Biological Science, Biotechnology)
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Marxist Theory
- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 16093–17093, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 16000), you can focus on reaching for top-tier majors like Computer Science and Technology and Ecology (Elite Class). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 17000), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, aiming for cost-effective majors like Statistics (A- discipline) and Economics.
